nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cream-throated white-eye
nodes.summary: Cream-throated white-eye（Zosterops atriceps）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Cream-throated white-eye。

nodes.name: Cream-throated white-eye
nodes.summary: The cream-throated white-eye (Zosterops atriceps) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to the northern Moluccas. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest. They can be found on the Maluku Utara in Indonesia. References
nodes.shortSummary: The cream-throated white-eye (Zosterops atriceps) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to the northern Moluccas.
